title: Token state node
description: One node of the language state graph, keyed by a norm_strict observation. Carries every hidden state the observation could emit from. If more than one hidden state denotes a different lemma/POS/form/voice, the node is a SPLIT and no single public gloss may fire on the key (decision=quarantine_homograph). public_export_allowed is true only when exactly one hidden state owns the key, or all states share the same authorable gloss.

norm_key.description: vowel-stripped key the live aid matches on

surfaces.description: every vocalized surface sharing this key -> count

hidden_states.description: candidate hidden states this observation may emit from

form.description: verb measure I-X / nominal pattern when known

decision.description: resolved=one owner + gloss live; pending=no safe single gloss yet; quarantine_homograph=split states (>1 lemma/POS/form); repair_candidate=entry field needs fixing

public_gloss.description: the authored English gloss IF resolved; never external text

used_by.description: back-references into the corpus this key fires on (quran:S:A:W or count)
